findings.message: Query selects a tenant column but never filters by it.
findings.fix: Add .eq("<column>", value) (or .match()/.filter()) to scope results to the caller.

findings.message: A Realtime postgres_changes subscription listens to an entire table with no filter.
findings.fix: Add a filter option scoped to the current user (e.g. filter: `receiver_id=eq.${user.id}`).

findings.message: A .single() query ignores the returned error field.
findings.fix: Destructure and check error, or use .maybeSingle() and handle a missing row explicitly.

findings.message: A Supabase insert/update/delete never checks the returned error field.
findings.fix: Destructure { error } from every mutation and revert optimistic UI or show a toast on failure.

findings.message: A Supabase insert/update/delete never checks the returned error field.
findings.fix: Destructure { error } from every mutation and revert optimistic UI or show a toast on failure.

findings.message: Insert has no idempotency/dedupe key, so a retry can create a duplicate row.
findings.fix: Add a client-generated idempotency key field backed by a unique constraint, or use .upsert(..., { onConflict: "<key column>" }).

findings.message: createClient is called with env vars that have no presence check.
findings.fix: Throw a clear error (e.g. if (!url || !key) throw new Error(...)) before calling createClient.

findings.message: Child rows are replaced via delete-then-insert without checking errors.
findings.fix: Wrap delete+insert in a Postgres RPC (single transaction) and surface error from each step.

findings.fix: Destructure { error } from every mutation and revert optimistic UI or show a toast on failure.

findings.message: Insert has no idempotency/dedupe key, so a retry can create a duplicate row.
findings.fix: Add a client-generated idempotency key field backed by a unique constraint, or use .upsert(..., { onConflict: "<key column>" }).

findings.message: createClient is called with env vars that have no presence check.
findings.fix: Throw a clear error (e.g. if (!url || !key) throw new Error(...)) before calling createClient.
